title: Fix task calls as fork statements

features.name: task with multiple sequential delays called under fork
features.description: Code should include a task containing multiple sequential #delay statements, called directly inside a fork...join block
features.snippet:
task foo; #1 if ($time != 1) $stop; #1 if ($time != 2) $stop; endtask
fork foo; join

features.name: fork with inlined task containing delays
features.description: Code should include a fork statement where a task with timing controls is called directly, without intermediate begin-end grouping
